title: Self-supervised learning on millions of pre-mRNA sequences from 72 vertebrates improves sequence-based RNA splicing prediction
author: Chen, Ken
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
The model weights of SpliceBERT ("models.tar.gz") and data ("data.tar.gz") for running the analysis in manuscript "Self-supervised learning on millions of pre-mRNA sequences from 72 vertebrates improves sequence-based RNA splicing prediction".  

 See https://github.com/biomed-AI/SpliceBERT for the codes.
steps_raw:
The model weights of SpliceBERT ("models.tar.gz") and data ("data.tar.gz") for running the analysis in manuscript "Self-supervised learning on millions of pre-mRNA sequences from 72 vertebrates improves sequence-based RNA splicing prediction".  

 See https://github.com/biomed-AI/SpliceBERT for the codes.
keywords: language model, RNA splicing, self-supervised learning
